candidate_problem_record.subject: math
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Four people can be seated at a square table. How many people at most could be seated if we pushed four tables of this kind together in one row?
<image1>
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集被视为具备较稳定的多解潜力，可进入更强的多解挖掘链路。
